diffCoverage.notes: Security-reviewed the credential cipher, the SQLite store, redaction, and the command/IPC boundary; the dependency manifests, the store module re-exports, and the config entrypoint carry no secret-handling logic (architecture reviewer covers those) and are listed uncovered. The live keychain roundtrip is run and attested.

resolvedFindings.resolution: The real-OS-keychain roundtrip (cred_store_roundtrip) is now run and attested in the evidence bundle: the on-disk credential blob is ciphertext (no plaintext cookie value) and decrypts in memory. The GUI relaunch auto-restore is tracked separately under session-restore, not this feature's contract smoke.

findings.evidence: Message bodies are stored in SQLite as plaintext. These are user data on the user's own machine (not a bearer token), and ADR-0005 accepts this for the durability goal; whole-DB encryption is deferred. Recorded as the accepted known risk message-plaintext-at-rest.
findings.fix: Track whole-DB/at-rest encryption (SQLCipher) as a future ADR; non-blocking.

findings.evidence: Raw capture is redacted by default; only the loudly-warned ZCA_LOG_RAW=1 opt-in writes unredacted payloads, intended for local debugging. The single capture_raw call site logs cookie names + counts only, not values.
findings.fix: Keep ZCA_LOG_RAW off in any shared/CI environment; no code change required.

summary: Security review of the encrypted credential store. Credentials are AES-256-GCM sealed (random 12-byte nonce, 32-byte key) under a keychain-held master key and stored as ciphertext — now proven by the run+attested live keychain roundtrip (ciphertext-on-disk asserted, decrypts in memory). AES-GCM errors are opaque, a truncated blob is rejected without panic, and the keychain holds only the master key. redact.rs masks every real Zalo secret cookie name and raw capture is redacted by default; all SQL is positional-parameter bound; no command returns or accepts credential/token values and the token-bearing GotLoginInfo QR event is dropped before the webview. The only residual is the ADR-0005-accepted plaintext-message-at-rest posture. No blocking findings; decision is pass.
